debug_info.goal:
p : ℕ
inst✝² : Fact (Nat.Prime p)
inst✝¹ : Fact (p > 2)
n r : ℕ
inst✝ : NeZero n
i₀ : ℕ
env : Environment (F p)
input_var : Var (fields n) (F p)
input : fields n (F p)
h_input : Vector.map (Expression.eval env) input_var = input
h_assumptions : True
h_env : ∀ (i : Fin n), env.get (i₀ + ↑i) = Expression.eval env (Vector.get input_var (⟨↑i, ⋯⟩ + Fin.ofNat n r))
⊢ Vector.map (Expression.eval env) (Vector.mapRange n fun i => var { index := i₀ + i }) =
    Vector.map (Expression.eval env) (Vector.mapFinRange n fun i => Vector.get input_var (i + Fin.ofNat n r))

failed_attempts:
simpa [Vector.mapRange, Vector.mapFinRange] using congrArg (Vector.map (Expression.eval env)) (by
      ext i
      simpa using (h_env i))

ext i
    simpa using h_env i

simpa [Vector.mapFinRange, Vector.mapRange] using congrArg (Vector.map (Expression.eval env)) (by
      ext i
      simp [h_env])

ext i
    simpa using congrArg (fun f => f i) h_env

  completeness := by
    circuit_proof_start
    sorry

ext i
    simpa using h_env i

ext i
    simpa using h_env i

  completeness := by
    circuit_proof_start
    sorry

ext i
    simpa [h_env]

  completeness := by
    circuit_proof_start
    sorry

ext i
    simp [Vector.mapRange, Vector.mapFinRange, h_env, Fin.cast_mk]

ext i
    simpa [Vector.mapRange, Vector.mapFinRange] using (h_env i)

  completeness := by
    circuit_proof_start
    sorry

ext i
    simpa [Vector.mapRange, Vector.mapFinRange, h_env] using h_env i

ext i
    simpa using (h_env i)

  completeness := by
    circuit_proof_start
    sorry

simpa [h_input] using h_env

  completeness := by
    circuit_proof_start
    sorry

ext i
    simpa using h_env i

ext i
    simpa using (h_env i)

  completeness := by
    circuit_proof_start
    sorry

ext i
    simp [Vector.map, Vector.mapRange, Vector.mapFinRange, h_env]
